name._value: [Deep Forest of Patience] John's Last Present

0._value: I heard #p100# has one final thing to ask me...

1._value: I ran into #p100# the fisherman again in #m10000000#. This time, he told me his mother passed away recently, and he wanted to get some White Violas for her. He asked me to get #b30 #t4031044#s#k for him. The scent of White Violas last over 1000 years... and according to #p100#, they can be found through the #p609# again, where the flowers may be found. Man... do I HAVE to go in there again??

2._value: I got #p100# all #b30 #t4031044#s#k. They have a nice scent, but 30 of them? Makes my head spin... As a sign of appreciation, #p100# gave me a set of his mother's earrings. These earrings look like they are made of some common flowers, but it seems there's something to it...

0._value: Ohhh... you're the person that did me huge favors before. You look so much stronger now that I can't even recognize you anymore. By now, it looks like you have gone pretty much everywhere. I have one last favor to ask you. Well, my mother passed away a few days ago of old age. I need a special kind of flower for her on her grave... can you get them for me?

Thank you so much! The flowers I want on her grave are called #b#t4031044##k and they're a very rare kind. I heard they're found deep in the forest... I heard the place where they exist doesn't let everyone in; only a select few, I think. Something about a #p609# in #m10005000# and something something...

1._value: Please get me #b30 #t4031044#s#k. I want to get a whole bunch for my mother's grave. Please hurry!

0._value: I see... my mother loved looking at those flowers while she was alive... I wished that you could get them for me and for her... I understand...

Ohhh... you got me all #b30 #t4031044#s#k!  This is awesome... I can't believe you went deep into the forest and got these flowers... there's a story about this flower where it supposedly doesn't die for 1000 years and it glows on its own. I can make a nice wreath out of these and bring it to my mother's grave...

1._value: Oh, and... since you have worked hard for me, I should reward you well. My late mother left me these earrings before passing away. Apparently she had them since she was young. I don't know, but they seem to have some kind of a special power hidden in them... anyway please take them.

0._value: If you have time, why not try going back into the forest? You might find an important item in there. I can't guarantee it since obviously I've never been there before, so please don't come back complaining if all you can find is trash.

You haven't gotten the #b#t4031044#s#k yet. There's a #p609# in #m10005000# and I heard that with that you can go to the place where the #t4031044#s#k are. Please go into the forest and collect the #t4031044#s#k for me. I need 30 to make a wreath.
